---
title: "Tutorial"
---

[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/1293534034.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21263350)

In this project we aim to visualise the trends of the most frequently used baby names from 1880 to 2017 in the United States. We do this by:

- Understanding the different columns of the data set
- Finding the top 10 most frequently used baby names in the data for:
  - girls
  - boys
- Plotting the yearly trend of the top 10 baby names

![Sepia image of two caucasian infants](https://live.staticflickr.com/5140/5457250712_45734e0548_b.jpg){fig-align="right" width="400"}
